steps.title: Distribute the 6 across the second group
Rewrite with expanded terms and combine like terms
Evaluate each choice
steps.content:
The simplified expression is $x^{3}+14x^{2}-7x+30$.
  • A) $x^{3}+6x^{2}-7x+30$: $x^2$ coefficient is 6, not 14 — incorrect.
  • B) $x^{3}+8x^{2}-7x+30$: $x^2$ coefficient is 8, ignoring the distributed $6x^2$ — incorrect.
  • C) $x^{3}+14x^{2}-7x+30$: matches exactly. That confirms C is correct.
  • D) $x^{3}+5x^{2}-7x+30$: $x^2$ coefficient is 5 — incorrect.
